page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u1-c1m2.xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server powered by a 2.5 GHz Intel Xeon processor. It features 4 dedicated physical cores with 1 thread per core, providing 4 vCPUs. The instance is equipped with 8.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 2.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or a GPU, and it operates on a KVM hypervisor with a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate average single-core capabilities but weaker multi-core scaling. The single-core stress-ng and Geekbench scores fall into the average tier, as do single-threaded gzip compression and bzip3 decompression tasks. However, multi-core benchmarks, including stress-ng multi-core, Geekbench multi-core, and Passmark CPU tests, register in the weak category. Memory bandwidth is also constrained, with uncached read speeds of 30.16 GB/sec and cached read speeds of 212.07 GB/sec, both scoring in the bottom 25 percent.

Given the 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and dedicated CPU allocation, this server is positioned for compute-focused workloads that do not require massive memory footprints or local storage. It is suitable for lightweight single-threaded applications, basic text processing, and small-scale LLM inference tasks. However, it is poorly suited for memory-intensive databases, parallelized compilation, or high-throughput web serving due to its weak multi-core performance and limited memory bandwidth.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u1-c1m2.xlarge is an x86_64 server featuring 4 dedicated Intel Xeon physical cores running at 2.5 GHz, paired with 8.0 GB of RAM. Operating on a KVM hypervisor, this instance provides a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps but lacks local storage and GPU acceleration. Benchmarks show average single-core performance, particularly in single-threaded compression and text processing, alongside average prompt processing speeds for small language models. However, multi-core performance and memory bandwidth are relatively weak, making this server less suitable for highly parallelized workloads or large databases. It is best utilized for lightweight compute tasks, single-threaded applications, and basic utility processing where dedicated CPU resources are required without a large memory footprint.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u1-c1m2.xlarge is an x86_64 server with 4 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 8.0 GB of RAM, and 2 Gbps network bandwidth, offering average single-core performance for lightweight compute workloads.

tagline: A dedicated four-core compute instance offering balanced single-threaded performance for lightweight utility workloads and basic text processing tasks.

8.0 GB of system memory with a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
2 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage
Average single-core performance in compression and text processing
Best suited for lightweight single-threaded applications and basic utility tasks
